boundary: PlanA-ST-only v1 is barcode-free. DARLIN/barcode validation is future work.

required_wording.barcode_boundary: This is ST-only / barcode-free; DARLIN/barcode validation is future work.
required_wording.comparator: M4 is a D35-enriched non-terminal comparator.
required_wording.fate_probability: Kmix_A absorption to M5 is the PlanA-inferred absorption/fate probability.

required_wording.intermediate_states: M2/M3 are intermediate/transient macrostates with source tendency.
